character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Commander of the group, oversees defensive preparations and issues orders during the attack.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group assigned to the north side for defense.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Medical professional involved in the defense and tactical assessment.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group stationed at a defensive post.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Defender assigned to the east side, participates in initial gunfire.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group tasked with loading muskets and eating.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to distribute brandy during preparations.
